title: Vietnamese Chicken Bake
description: A flavorful and aromatic bake featuring marinated chicken, crunchy vegetables, and a hint of Vietnamese spices.

ingredients.name: baked vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, zucchini, and bell peppers

instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry and place it in a baking dish.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the garlicky sauce and vietnamese herbs.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Place the marinated chicken on top of the pastry.
Add the baked vegetables around the chicken.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
